name: Cheesy Ham Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, milk, mustard, salt, dill weed, and pepper.
2. Gradually add the macaroni, cheddar cheese, ham, onion, and pimento, stirring to mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered 2-quart shallow baking dish.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake for 45 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and quickly sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese on top.
7. Serve hot.
